heading: API Documentation
body:
To learn more about any of the methods discussed in this
guide, see the following API documentation:

- [find()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/Collection.html#find)

- [limit()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/FindCursor.html#limit)

- [sort()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/FindCursor.html#sort)

- [skip()](https://mongodb.github.io/node-mongodb-native/7.1/classes/FindCursor.html#skip)
